cedict_en: younger brother/junior male/I (modest word in letter)/variant of 悌[ti4]

must_distinguish.note: 弟 = morpheme used in compounds (兄弟, 弟子); 弟弟 = standalone colloquial word for younger brother

cedict_en: strength/intensity/CL:個|个[ge4]

must_distinguish.note: All involve strength/force. 强度 = measurable intensity/degree (of effort, light, exercise — not personal); 力量 = strength/power as capacity or force (abstract, can be moral); 力气 = physical bodily strength (colloquial, effort of muscles).

cedict_en: surname Gui/to return/to go back to/to give back to/(of a responsibility) to be taken care of by/to belong to/to gather together/(used between two identical verbs) despite/to marry (of a woman) (old)/division on the abacus with a one-digit divisor
dataset_meanings: (of a responsibility) to be taken care of by
division on the abacus with a one-digit divisor

must_distinguish.note: 返回 = go/travel back (neutral direction); 回来 = come back toward speaker; 归 = return to one's place/origin (literary) or belong to; 归还 = give back a borrowed object

cedict_en: to carve wood/surname Lu/diary/record/to hit/to copy

must_distinguish.note: 录 = record (audio/video/data); 抄 = hand-copy text (also plagiarize); 复印 = photocopy a document (machine reproduction)

cedict_en: color/multicolored

must_distinguish.note: 色 is a morpheme/literary noun; 颜色 is the everyday neutral noun for 'color'; 彩色 means 'multicolored/color' as an attribute (彩色电视); 色彩 (5k) is literary/figurative 'hue/flavor'

cedict_en: able to/so that sb can/enabling/in order to/finally in a position to/with sth in view

must_distinguish.note: 能够 = neutral modal 'can; be able to'; 得以 = formal/literary 'manage to; be enabled to' — implies a prior condition made it possible, cannot start a sentence alone

cedict_en: central point/in one's thoughts/in one's heart

must_distinguish.note: Both mean 'in one's heart/mind'. 心里 is everyday spoken; 心中 is literary/formal, often used in written or elevated registers.

cedict_en: to bear/to endure/to tolerate/to restrain oneself

must_distinguish.note: 忍 = endure by holding back (suppress reaction). 忍耐 = endure with sustained self-restraint. 承受 = withstand (bear a load or blow). 熬 = tough it out slowly (simmer through difficulty). 挨 = endure passively (stall or suffer through). 吃苦 = endure hardship (accept a hard life).

cedict_en: aspiration/ambition/to volunteer

must_distinguish.note: 志愿 = aspiration + concrete act of volunteering; 抱负 = high ambition (formal, no action); 愿望 = personal wish or desire (emotional, not necessarily acted on)

cedict_en: erhua variant of 快點|快点[kuai4 dian3]

must_distinguish.note: 快点儿 is an exclamatory urge ('hurry up!', often directed at others); 赶快 is an adverb meaning 'quickly, hurry' (neutral volition); 赶紧 emphasises self-motivated promptness to avoid missing an opportunity

cedict_en: to blame/(bound form) resentment; hatred; grudge

must_distinguish.note: 怨 = resent/blame (internal feeling, often directed at fate/others); 指责 = criticize/blame publicly (formal, accusatory); 责怪 = reproach informally (interpersonal, casual register).

cedict_en: completely/totally/total/entire/overall/population (statistics)

must_distinguish.note: 总体 = overall/in aggregate (scope adverb or adj, e.g. 总体来看); 全局 = the whole situation considered as one unit (often strategic); 格局 = the underlying pattern/configuration of a situation (structural, big-picture framing)

cedict_en: total/sum/aggregate

must_distinguish.note: 总数 = total count/number (noun, refers to a quantity of items); 总和 = sum/total (noun, mathematical); 共计 = to total, amounts to (verb/adv, formal); 总共 = in total (adverb, pure quantity); 共 = together/in total (shortest, also means 'together')

cedict_en: sad; sorrowful

must_distinguish.note: 难过 = general feeling of sadness/upset (colloquial); 伤心 = heartbroken, deeply pained; 悲伤 = sorrowful, mournful (more literary/formal)

cedict_en: tragedy/CL:齣|出[chu1]

must_distinguish.note: 电视剧 = TV drama/series (medium-specific); 连续剧 = serial/series (emphasises ongoing episodes); 戏剧 = drama/theater (art form, stage or screen); 悲剧 = tragedy (a genre, also fig. 'a tragedy')

cedict_en: feeling/emotion/to move (emotionally)

must_distinguish.note: 情感 = emotion/feeling (affective, emotional bond — 情感上的联系); 感觉 = feeling/sensation (perception via senses or gut impression — more neutral/cognitive).

cedict_en: to recall/to think of/to call to mind

must_distinguish.note: 记住 = commit to memory (active memorizing); 想起 = recall something previously forgotten; 想到 = think of/realize (may be spontaneous); 记忆 = memory as faculty or stored recollection (noun/verb)

cedict_en: to worry about

must_distinguish.note: 愁 = sad, melancholic worry (diffuse, emotional); 担心 = worry about something specific; 操心 = actively worry on behalf of others; 顾虑 = misgivings/reservations that hold you back

cedict_en: idea/opinion/meaning/wish/desire/interest/fun/token of appreciation, affection etc/CL:個|个[ge4]/to give as a small token/to do sth as a gesture of goodwill etc
dataset_meanings: to give as a small token
to do sth as a gesture of goodwill etc

must_distinguish.note: 意思 = the meaning/sense of words or a signal; 想法 = one's personal viewpoint or thought; 主意 = a concrete plan or idea (actionable); 大意 = the gist or main point of a text

cedict_en: honest and prudent/variant of 願|愿[yuan4]/(bound form) wish; hope; desire/to be willing/to wish (that sth may happen); may .../vow; pledge

must_distinguish.note: 愿 = wish/desire (also used in set phrases); 愿意 = be willing to do sth (neutral); 乐意 = be glad/happy to do sth (positive affect)

cedict_en: slow

must_distinguish.note: 慢 = adjective/predicate 'slow'; 慢慢 = adverb 'slowly/gradually' (also implies patience); 迟缓 = slow and sluggish (often negative, of reaction or movement).

cedict_en: slowly; gradually

must_distinguish.note: 慢 = adjective/predicate 'slow'; 慢慢 = adverb 'slowly/gradually' (also implies patience); 迟缓 = slow and sluggish (often negative, of reaction or movement).
慢慢 = slowly, at a relaxed pace (pace focus); 逐渐 = gradually over time (time focus); 逐步 = step by step, in stages (process focus, more formal).

cedict_en: to understand; to know; to comprehend
dataset_meanings: to understand; to know; to comprehend

must_distinguish.note: 懂得 = know how to / understand (intuitive grasp, often of principles); 了解 = know about / find out (factual knowledge, investigation); 理解 = understand (grasp meaning/reasoning); 领会 = comprehend by guidance (absorb instruction/spirit); 清楚 = clear / understand clearly (adj. and verb)

cedict_en: to reach adulthood/an adult

must_distinguish.note: 成人 is formal/written (legal, official contexts); 大人 is colloquial/spoken, used esp. when talking to children

cedict_en: to guard against/to exhort/to admonish or warn/to give up or stop doing sth/Buddhist monastic discipline/ring (for a finger)
dataset_meanings: to give up or stop doing sth

must_distinguish.note: 退出 = exit a place/app/organization; 戒 = quit a habit (smoking, drinking) by self-discipline; 撤退 = military/tactical withdrawal; 退 = back up or return something

cedict_en: to prevail over/to defeat/to surmount

must_distinguish.note: 赢 = win (general, colloquial). 打败 = beat/defeat (an opponent, often physical contest). 战胜 = overcome/prevail over (battle or hardship, more formal/literary).

cedict_en: house/building/CL:所[suo3],套[tao4]

must_distinguish.note: 房屋 is formal 'building/house'; 屋 is literary/short for room or house; 屋子 is colloquial 'room'; 住房 emphasises residential function/housing as a social concept; 公寓 specifically means apartment building

cedict_en: place/location/(after a noun) place where it is located
dataset_meanings: (after a noun) place where it is located

must_distinguish.note: 所在 = whereabouts/location of something (abstract, 'where X is'); 地点 = specific concrete place/venue

cedict_en: what one is good at; one's strong point/director; head of an institute, office or station

must_distinguish.note: 首 = head/chief (literary, also classifier for songs/poems); 组长 = small team/group leader; 所长 = head of an institute or bureau; 领导 = everyday boss/leader (also verb: to lead); 领导人 = official leader (formal title); 领袖 = top political figure/chief (elevated, reverential)

cedict_en: to break; to smash

must_distinguish.note: 打破 = shatter/smash (also break records or limits); 破 = broken state or the act of breaking (broad); 断 = snap/cut off (linear things: rope, signal, contact).

cedict_en: to defeat/to overpower/to beat/to be defeated

must_distinguish.note: 赢 = win (general, colloquial). 打败 = beat/defeat (an opponent, often physical contest). 战胜 = overcome/prevail over (battle or hardship, more formal/literary).

cedict_en: to extend/to expand/extension/expansion

must_distinguish.note: 扩展 = broaden scope or function (neutral); 扩张 = aggressive territorial/political expansion; 扩充 = expand by adding members or items; 扩大 = increase in scale or size

cedict_en: to copy/to transcribe

must_distinguish.note: 抄 = copy by hand / plagiarize. 抄写 = copy out by hand (deliberate transcription, study context). 复印 = photocopy (machine reproduction of document). 复制 = duplicate/replicate (digital or physical, broader).

cedict_en: to raise one's head; to look up/(fig.) to begin to emerge; to show signs of growth/(commerce) account name, or space for writing the name on checks, bills etc
dataset_meanings: account name, or space for writing the name on checks, bills etc

must_distinguish.note: 举手 = raise one's hand (specific gesture, e.g. voting or asking); 抬头 = raise one's head (look up); 举 = lift/raise in general or cite an example (broader base verb)

cedict_en: to draw out; to pull out from in between/to remove part of the whole/to inhale (esp. smoke)/(of fabric etc) to shrink/(of certain plants) to sprout; to bud/to whip; to thrash/classifier for sheets (of tissues, wet wipes etc)
dataset_meanings: to pull out from in between
to remove part of the whole
(of certain plants) to sprout or bud

must_distinguish.note: 拔 = pull out forcefully (stuck objects: teeth, nails, weeds); 抽 = extract with sliding motion (cards, draw liquid, smoke); 引 = pull/attract/lead (abstract or directional, guide); 拉 = pull toward oneself (rope, handle, bow strings)

cedict_en: to tear down/to demolish/to dismantle/to remove

must_distinguish.note: 拆 = dismantle/tear down (single action, physical). 拆除 = demolish/remove (official, often structural, typically permanent).

cedict_en: to enroll new students/to get students
to get/to obtain

must_distinguish.note: 拿到 = get/grab (physical, hands-on); 得到 = get/receive (general, neutral); 获得 = obtain/gain (formal, achievements/awards); 取得 = achieve/obtain (formal, results/qualifications); 获 = obtain/capture (formal morpheme, written style)

cedict_en: to carry on a shoulder pole/to choose/to pick/to nitpick/to raise/to dig up/to poke/to prick/to incite/to stir up
dataset_meanings: to carry on a shoulder pole

must_distinguish.note: 挑 = pick with a discerning/picky eye (implies fussiness); 拣 = sort and pick out (practical selection); 选拔 = formally select talent or candidates (competitive)

cedict_en: to choose/to select

must_distinguish.note: 挑选 = pick by personal preference (everyday shopping, choosing); 筛选 = screen/filter by criteria (systematic, analytical); 拣 = pick out by hand/visually (physical, informal); 选拔 = select the best candidates (competitive, talent-focused); 选择 = choose from options (general, neutral).

cedict_en: used in 掙扎|挣扎[zheng1 zha2]/to struggle to get free/to strive to acquire/to make (money)
harm/to damage/to impair

must_distinguish.note: 害 = harm (basic, colloquial, can also be noun); 伤害 = hurt/injure (personal, bodily or emotional); 损害 = damage/harm (formal, abstract — interests, health, reputation); 损坏 = damage (physical objects); 危害 = endanger (serious systemic threat); 破坏 = destroy/sabotage (deliberate structural damage)

cedict_en: to arrange in order; to line up/to exclude; to eliminate; to repel; to expel; to discharge/(literary) to push aside; to force open/to rehearse/row; line/platoon/(bound form) steak; chop/(bound form) raft/classifier for rows or lines (of people or things)

must_distinguish.note: 排 = a physical row (seats, troops); 列 = a column/series, also 'to enumerate'; 排列 = to arrange in order (verb)

cedict_en: to receive (letter etc)

must_distinguish.note: 接到 = receive a specific communication (call, letter); 接受 = accept/take in (implies willingness); 受到 = be subjected to / undergo (often impact or treatment); 受 = receive or endure (broad base verb)

cedict_en: to implement; to carry out; to introduce (a policy, system, reform etc)/to promote; to advance (the practice of an art form, the use of a language etc)/to push along (a bicycle etc while walking)

must_distinguish.note: 推行 = roll out/implement (pushing adoption, often policy); 实行 = put into practice (execute an already-decided plan). 推行 implies active promotion; 实行 implies execution.

cedict_en: to mention; to bring up/(lit. and fig.) to lift; to raise/to initiate (legal proceedings)
dataset_meanings: to raise (a topic, a heavy weight, one's fist, one's spirits etc)

must_distinguish.note: 提 = base verb (carry/mention); 提到 = neutral reference to a topic; 提起 = initiate a topic or stir up (emotionally charged, often formal)

cedict_en: to search/variant of 蒐|搜[sou1]/(bound form) to collect; to gather

must_distinguish.note: 搜/搜索 = search by scanning (physical search, internet); 寻找 = look for a specific target; 寻求 = seek/pursue (abstract goals, solutions); 寻觅 = search with longing (literary/emotional)

cedict_en: to fall down/to slip and fall/to throw sb to the ground
dataset_meanings: to throw sb to the ground

must_distinguish.note: 摔 = fall/smash (fall with impact or throw down). 摔倒 = fall down (trip and land, bodily fall). 倒 = topple/fall over (object or person collapsing sideways). 掉 = fall off/drop (detach and drop, often implies separation).

cedict_en: (loanword) motor/(loanword) motorbike; motorcycle (abbr. for 摩托車|摩托车[mo2 tuo1 che1])

must_distinguish.note: 摩托车 is the standard full word for motorcycle; 摩托 is the abbreviated colloquial form, also used in compounds (摩托艇 etc.)

cedict_en: to broadcast/to air (a TV program etc)

must_distinguish.note: 播出 = to air/broadcast (a specific program, one-time output); 广播 = radio broadcasting as medium, or to broadcast generally (also a noun for radio).

cedict_en: to listen to (a radio broadcast)

must_distinguish.note: Both mean 'to listen'; 收听 = tune in to / listen to (radio or broadcast, receiver-oriented); 倾听 = listen attentively to a person (deferential, relational).

cedict_en: to charge a fee

must_distinguish.note: 收费 = charge a fee (the act of collecting payment); 免费 = free of charge (everyday, consumer context); 无偿 = free/without compensation (formal/legal, e.g. 无偿援助).

cedict_en: to gather/to collect

must_distinguish.note: 聚 = gather/assemble (people or things, naturally); 集合 = assemble (organised, commanded); 采集 = collect/harvest (specimens, data, natural resources); 收集 = gather/collect (items systematically); 收藏 = collect/keep (for pleasure or preservation — hobby)

cedict_en: (bound form) whole; complete; entire; (before a measure word) whole; (before or after number + measure word) exactly/(bound form) in good order; tidy; neat/(bound form) to put in order; to straighten/(bound form) to repair; to mend; to renovate/(coll.) to fix sb; to give sb a hard time; to mess with sb/(dialect) to tinker with; to do sth to
dataset_meanings: to give sb a hard time

must_distinguish.note: 全场 = whole audience/venue; 全部 (5k) = the total amount/all of it; 整 = exactly whole (整十年); 整整 = a full emphatic duration (整整三天); 整个 (5k) = the entire X as modifier; 整体 (5k) = the whole as a unified entity (noun).

cedict_en: all day long/whole day

must_distinguish.note: 整天 = neutral 'all day long'; 成天 = colloquial, often implies complaint or tedium

meaning_ru: целых (усилит. о длит.: 整整三天)
cedict_en: whole/full

must_distinguish.note: 全场 = whole audience/venue; 全部 (5k) = the total amount/all of it; 整 = exactly whole (整十年); 整整 = a full emphatic duration (整整三天); 整个 (5k) = the entire X as modifier; 整体 (5k) = the whole as a unified entity (noun).

cedict_en: traveler; tourist

must_distinguish.note: 游客 = tourist (sightseeing, leisure traveler); 旅客 = traveler/passenger (any traveler, incl. transit)

cedict_en: hotel/CL:家[jia1]

must_distinguish.note: 旅馆 is a generic/older word for inn or hotel; 宾馆 is a standard/state-run hotel; 酒店 is modern, often upscale — same concept but grading in formality and class

cedict_en: already at an earlier time

must_distinguish.note: All express 'already/long since'; 早就 stresses the speaker's emphasis (often mild exasperation), 早已 is slightly more literary/neutral, 已 is a literary particle seldom used alone in speech.

cedict_en: for a long time; long since/(dialect) in the past
dataset_meanings: for a long time; long since

must_distinguish.note: All express 'already/long since'; 早就 stresses the speaker's emphasis (often mild exasperation), 早已 is slightly more literary/neutral, 已 is a literary particle seldom used alone in speech.
